title: donella delphinensis
intro: Donella delphinensis, also known as the 'Swallowwort', is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Donella delphinensis include its ability to ease respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
